en: :[name=\n[1]]:They appear to be resting while clinging to the cave wall.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
es: :[name=\n[1]]:Parece que descansan colgados de la pared de la cueva.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:

en: :[name=\n[1]]:A round and energetic Critter. It flutters about restlessly.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
:[name=\n[1]]:It is so small I nearly stepped on it.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
es: :[name=\n[1]]:Es tan pequeño que casi lo piso.:[bloop_sound=voice_toriel,100,100]:
